messages.content: You are a virtual assistant. The user consulting on household budget management.
I've been trying to save money but it's hard to know where to start. Do you have any tips on setting up a budget?

Absolutely. The first step is usually to identify your income and expenses, then divide the expenses into fixed and variable categories. After that, you can see where adjustments can be made to save more money.
Alright, I guess I start recording all my expenses. For the fixed ones, I know I have my rent, utilities, and...
